> **输出语言 / Output language:** Run this whole flow in **简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)** — all questions, prose, ADRs, and glossary/`CONTEXT.md` entries in Chinese. Keep code identifiers, file names/paths, and commands in their original form. Language only; the behavior is unchanged.

Run a `/grilling` session, using the `/domain-modeling` skill.
